text:
Professor: Tarek Abdelzaher | Course: CS424
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Mar 9th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: One of the worst professors I have ever had. Tough grader Participation matters

Professor: Tarek Abdelzaher | Course: CS424
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jan 25th, 2022
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: No, Grade: B, Textbook: No
Review: He really don't care about the class and he would not answer the questions on Piazza. Course content is not difficult but very confusing. There is also not clear grading results after the class, only a grade letter.

Professor: Tarek Abdelzaher | Course: CS424
Quality: 2.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Jun 9th, 2015
Details: For Credit: Yes, Grade: B+, Textbook: No
Review: He keeps going over whatever he wants. He is great but I think he must dedicate some time to teach seriously

Professor: Tarek Abdelzaher | Course: CS423
Quality: 3.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: May 2nd, 2015
Details: For Credit: Yes, Textbook: No
Review: The exams are pretty much unrelated to the programming assignments, so if you do well on the programming assignments, that doesn't mean that you're prepared for the exams. For no good reason at all, 10% of the grade is for participation, which is objectionable in any serious class.

Professor: Tarek Abdelzaher | Course: CS423
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Apr 4th, 2015
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Grade: A-, Textbook: No
Review: Hard to understand. He doesn't care about his students.

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 19th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: Not sure yet, Textbook: No
Review: Excellent lecturer, the discussions that happen during her presentations are invaluable to learning pretty much anything in this course. So while attendance isn't mandatory, you're missing out on a huge portion of the class by skipping lecture.

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 19th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: Not sure yet, Textbook: No
Review: Only complaint is that is that the 1 midterm and 1 final can get you if you're not super prepared. Respected Skip class? You won't pass. Amazing lectures

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 18th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Would Take Again: Yes, Textbook: Yes
Review: CS433 was a well instructed course taught by a passionate professor who truly cared about her students. Multiple times she would regularly ask us how the class was going (i.e. pacing, difficulty).

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 18th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Would Take Again: Yes, Textbook: Yes
Review: pacing, difficulty). The material was challenging (it's a 400 level course at UoI after all), but the ample resources and generous deadlines were enough to succeed. ACCESSIBLE OUTSIDE CLASS Amazing lectures Caring

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 18th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Textbook: Yes
Review: Shocked to see the previous post. CS433 with Professor Adve is one of the most useful and inspiring courses I've taken in the CS department. The materials covered in this course are definitely hard, but the professor and the TA tried their best to make our lives easier.

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 18th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Textbook: Yes
Review: Been to both their office hours, I really appreciated their patience and help. Participation matters Inspirational ACCESSIBLE OUTSIDE CLASS

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Jul 17th, 2018
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: No
Review: Excellent lectures. Really well versed in the material she teachers. Encourages lots of questions and exploring outside the basic curriculum. Hard tests with low averages, but thats alright when you're learning a lot! Inspirational TEST HEAVY Amazing lectures

Professor: Sarita Adve | Course: CS433
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: May 4th, 2016
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Textbook: No
Review: Knows a lot about this stuff and makes an effort to make the class useful and interesting for everyone instead of strictly following book/slides

Professor: Vikram Adve | Course: CS426
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 30th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: Challenging but interesting class. Very project-heavy, but instructions were clear and test cases were shared. Projects were fun but quite long. Very doable in the end, but takes effort. Amazing lectures Respected Graded by few things

Professor: Vikram Adve | Course: CS526
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 5th, 2016
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: Overall the course was taught very well. The professor knows his content and does a good job of communicating with the students. Respected Inspirational

Professor: Vikram Adve | Course: CS526
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 1.0 | Date: Nov 20th, 2013
Details: Attendance: Mandatory, Grade: A+, Textbook: Yes
Review: Excellent professor. He knows the subject matter extremely well, very friendly, explains everything well. And goes easy on gradings as well :-)

Professor: Vikram Adve | Course: CS241
Quality: 3.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jan 17th, 2012
Details: Textbook: No
Review: He was a very average professor. He seemed like a relatively friendly and approachable guy, but he didn't leave much of an impression on me. He does a decent job of explaining the content, and 241 with him was moderately hard.

Professor: Rishika Agarwal | Course: INFO102
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jul 24th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Textbook: N/A
Review: Amazing TA! I passed the course, thanks to her help.

Professor: Rishika Agarwal | Course: INFO102
Quality: 2.0 | Difficulty: 2.0 | Date: Nov 19th, 2020
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Would Take Again: No, Grade: A, Textbook: No
Review: She was my TA for INFO 102. She wasn't that great and didn't explain things well

Professor: Abdussalam Alawini | Course: CS411
Quality: 2.0 | Difficulty: 1.0 | Date: May 27th, 2026
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: Everything is taught entirely at a surface level, which is fine for SQL but detrimental for the theoretical database topics. The class, including the group project, is painfully easy, presenting little challenge. Good for learning SQL and easily fulfilling a requirement, but not for learning.

Professor: Abdussalam Alawini | Course: CS411
Quality: 2.0 | Difficulty: 1.0 | Date: May 27th, 2026
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: Participation matters Group projects

Professor: Abdussalam Alawini | Course: CS411
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Apr 26th, 2026
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Textbook: N/A
Review: Group project has nothing to do with whats taught in class and is worth a large part of the grade, would not recommend Group projects

Professor: Abdussalam Alawini | Course: CS411
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Apr 26th, 2026
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Textbook: N/A
Review: Group project is an overcomplicated mess that has nothing to do with whats taught in the class. Absolutely ridiculous Group projects

Professor: Abdussalam Alawini | Course: CS411
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Mar 27th, 2026
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Textbook: N/A
Review: This guy made a series of videos years ago and uses them as the only "teaching" in the class so he can use lectures to do zero teaching every week, videos arent remotely helpful either. Unbelievable that no teaching is done in lecture at all, exams are tricky too, wish i did not take this class

Professor: Abdussalam Alawini | Course: CS411
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Mar 9th, 2026
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory
Review: No clear instructions or examples whatsoever

Professor: Roy Campbell | Course: CS498
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Apr 1st, 2017
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: No, Textbook: No, Online Class: Yes
Review: I took one of his online classes, and it was terrible. The lecture content is often out-of-date by over three years, even though they were recorded far more recently. The quizzes, which are multiple choice, often have the wrong answer chosen in the answer key.

Professor: Roy Campbell | Course: CS498
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Apr 1st, 2017
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: No, Textbook: No, Online Class: Yes
Review: In other instances, the correct answer isn't even present. GROUP PROJECTS

Professor: Roy Campbell | Course: CS523
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Oct 22nd, 2013
Details: Textbook: No
Review: Horrible, horrible, horrible... Wish that I had dropped the class soon in the term.

Professor: Roy Campbell | Course: CS423
Quality: 2.5 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Feb 27th, 2013
Details: Textbook: No
Review: Roy is a joke. he is not a good researcher, advisor, or a teacher.

Professor: Roy Campbell | Course: CS523
Quality: 4.0 | Difficulty: 2.0 | Date: Aug 31st, 2012
Details: Textbook: No
Review: This class will keep you challenged while providing in site to the way operating systems work. Suggest all grad take his class. Willing to help if you ask for it.

Professor: Roy Campbell | Course: N/A
Quality: 4.0 | Difficulty: 2.0 | Date: Jul 23rd, 2008
Details: Textbook: Yes
Review: OS1 A good guy, true visionary. Interested in all research topics. Will let you do any thing you like (won't force you on something he wants done).

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Mar 11th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A-, Textbook: N/A
Review: Extremely passionate professor who clearly loves what he teaches. Dr. Angrave makes lectures very engaging and there are ample resources to learn in the way you want.

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Mar 11th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A-, Textbook: N/A
Review: The MPs can be quite long but office hours are very helpful in getting through them and if you put in the effort to learn you can excel in this class. Amazing lectures Lots of homework Accessible outside class

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Dec 27th, 2024
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A-, Textbook: Yes, Online Class: Yes
Review: Great professor who makes a tough class engaging. Lectures are worth attending, and the free textbook is helpful. Use resources like Unstuck AI and past lectures to stay on top of the material. Overall, a rewarding experience.

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: May 18th, 2024
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: Very engaging and passionate lecturer. Amazing lectures

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Apr 20th, 2024
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A
Review: An excellent, entertaining professor that made otherwise excruciatingly difficult material bearable. Amazing lectures Lots of homework Respected

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jan 10th, 2024
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: Absolutely best prof I have had in UIUC. He gave us multiple extensions just because some of us are lagging behind a bit within reason. Even though the class is difficult in nature with a lot of content, he make the entire experience exceptional.

Professor: Lawrence Angrave | Course: CS241
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jan 10th, 2024
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes
Review: GOAT, he is why I paid the big bucks for UIUC tuition. Amazing lectures

Professor: Arindam Banerjee | Course: CS598
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Apr 25th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: Arindam does not know how to explain concepts in a digestible manner without math. Further, his slides and assignments were riddled with mistakes, making doing the HW extremely challenging.

Professor: Arindam Banerjee | Course: CS598
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Apr 25th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: This, on top of the fact that the HW was already way too challenging made the course almost unbearable (coming from someone whose PhD is on the course topic). Lots of homework

Professor: Arindam Banerjee | Course: CS598
Quality: 2.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Apr 1st, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: Not sure yet, Textbook: N/A
Review: Banerjee's DGM class is a mess. He goes into lecture, talks about the history of the generative models, and just skips right to the math without giving much intuition on what is going on. I was better off reading the actual paper referenced in the slides than going to lecture.

Professor: Arindam Banerjee | Course: CS598
Quality: 2.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Apr 1st, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: Not sure yet, Textbook: N/A
Review: His HWs are also annoying as well, HWs can take over 20 hrs to solve. Get ready to read Group projects Lots of homework

Professor: Arindam Banerjee | Course: CS412
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Sep 20th, 2022
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: Not sure yet, Textbook: N/A
Review: Professor is quite helpful and to the point. I love it. Amazing lectures Clear grading criteria Inspirational

Professor: Arindam Banerjee | Course: CS412
Quality: 4.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jan 27th, 2022
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: Yes, Online Class: Yes
Review: Pros: The lecture is clear and the textbook is helpful. Homework and Exam are in fair difficulty. Concepts are helpful in the data analysis field. Cons: Professor is not quite willing to talk during office hours, but maybe he's just tired.

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Jul 25th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A+, Textbook: N/A
Review: Terrible, frequently unavailable, and incredibly frustrating to work with. He appeared to struggle with basic concepts and tasks. It is hard to tell whether he is being deliberately obtuse or extremely lazy when it comes to making forward progress with students; probably both.

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: Jul 25th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A+, Textbook: N/A
Review: Also, doing research under him AWFUL (in my experience). DON'T DO IT!

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Jun 7th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A-, Textbook: N/A
Review: Prof Caesar is one of the best professors I have ever had! Class is average difficulty, maybe a little on the harder side, but Prof Caesar helped me all the way through it. I would 100% recommend him to any students! Inspirational Caring Respected

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: May 19th, 2025
Details: Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: Unorganized curriculum and unreliable instruction. Avoid.

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: May 19th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: This is the worst course that I have ever taken. Don't get it wrong, I got an A for the course, but my conclusion is the same: don't waste your time in this course. The instructions for each lab are 5 years out of date, which wastes my time filling the gap.

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Date: May 19th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: The professor never shows up, he even went missing when we reserved a OH meeting 3 times

Professor: Matthew Caesar | Course: CS437
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Oct 20th, 2021
Details: For Credit: Yes, Would Take Again: Yes, Textbook: No
Review: Great teacher! Took for CS 437 and felt cared about every step of the way. He is such a genuine and caring person to each and every student he talks to. Lab assignments are really hard but learned a HUGE amount and his lectures are amazing. I would take him again if I could! Gives good feedback Inspirational

Professor: Chandra Chekuri | Course: CS374
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Oct 15th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A+, Textbook: N/A
Review: Very clear lectures and reasonable curve whenever exams are difficult Amazing lectures Caring Test heavy

Professor: Chandra Chekuri | Course: CS374
Quality: 3.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: May 25th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A-, Textbook: N/A
Review: Lectures are a mixed bag–Chandra blurs the line between making sure that you struggle hard enough to go through the growth pain of learning the material, but sometimes makes the content too hard to the point where it feels unfair. Chandra is clearly very bright, and loves the pedagogical aspects of the course.

Professor: Chandra Chekuri | Course: CS374
Quality: 3.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: May 25th, 2025
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Grade: A-, Textbook: N/A
Review: Lots of exwtra credit. Tough grader EXTRA CREDIT Accessible outside class

Professor: Chandra Chekuri | Course: CS374
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 4.0 | Date: Aug 30th, 2023
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A, Textbook: N/A
Review: I took CS 374 on 23 Spring and asked questions very often. He is nice and patient to answer questions. The lecture is clear and exam is not that difficult as I imagined before. I cannot get an A without him :D Inspirational Caring

Professor: Chandra Chekuri | Course: CS374
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 3.0 | Date: Aug 19th, 2023
Details: For Credit: Yes, Attendance: Not Mandatory, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A+, Textbook: Yes
Review: the goat Amazing lectures Inspirational

Professor: Chandra Chekuri | Course: CS374
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 1.0 | Date: May 17th, 2023
Details: For Credit: Yes, Would Take Again: Yes, Grade: A+
Review: one of the best professors I've ever met. I love his lecture. Amazing lectures

Professor: Charles Martin Jr. | Course: ACCY202
Quality: 5.0 | Difficulty: 1.0 | Date: Mar 5th, 2012
Details: Textbook: Yes
Review: My accounting TA is a man's man. I pray he goes to grad school here and if he doesn't I may just have to transfer. He manages to maximize understanding while keeping the workload down. And somehow his lighthearted jokes and enthusiasm makes accounting interesting. SERIOUSLY. Accounting.
